name: Chicken Jubilee
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, lightly salt and spread the chicken pieces in a single layer.
2. Broil until the skin is light gold on each side, about 10 minutes total.
3. Drain the cherries and save the syrup.
4. Add 1/2 cup sherry to the syrup and enough orange juice to make 2 1/4 cups of liquid.
5. Stir in the lemon rind and pour over the chicken.
6. Bring to a boil, then simmer covered over low heat until tender, about 30 minutes.
7. If preparing ahead, remove the chicken and refrigerate it with the cooking liquid overnight.
8. Skim off any congealed fat from the surface of the liquid.
9. Return the chicken to the liquid and reheat gently.
10. Stir in the cherries.
11. Mix the cornstarch with 3 tablespoons orange juice together, then stir slowly into the cooking liquid.
12. Continue cooking until the sauce thickens.
13. Serve with rice. YIELD: 4-6 servings.
